core_concept: 一個結合了科技與神秘元素的虛構生物設計，體現規則與秩序的嚴格執行
visual_elements: 機械與生物融合的肢體結構
嵌入式螢幕顯示規則文字
環形光束形成監控場景
composition_hint: 將核心生物形體置於視覺中心，周圍環繞數據流與規則文字的光暈效果，強調科技與神秘的融合
potential_subjects: SCP Wiki 规则执行者生物
数据流构成的神秘守护者
全息警告标志与机械生物的结合体
original_excerpt:
This page lists all major SCP wiki rules, and how warnings and bans work. Follow the spirit of the rules, not just the exact letter.
Fold
Unfold
Table of Contents
Rule Zero
I. Interaction & Behavior
II. Site Content
III. Interacting With Staff
IV. Disciplinary Process
V. Appeals
VI. Other things that can get you in trouble
See Also
Rule Zero
Don't be a dick.
This is the foremost rule from which most other rules follow. We expect you to behave in a reasonably civil, mature, and non-disruptive way
